planner_strategies.strategic_objective: Explore the coexistence of feature redundancy with strong class-conditioned representational differences to clarify their interplay and impact on model robustness.
key_checks: Identify features with high redundancy but distinct class-conditioned distributions
Assess redundancy patterns within and across classes
Examine feature subsets for differential representational strength by class
success_criteria: Clear characterization of features that are redundant yet class-discriminative
Insights into how redundancy affects feature selection and model stability
Evidence of tension patterns that inform robustness considerations

planner_strategies.strategic_objective: Clarify the nature and role of effectively constant features coexisting with highly variable features to inform their treatment in modeling and interpretation.
key_checks: Measure subtle variations within constant features across classes
Investigate potential data collection or preprocessing origins of constants
Compare constants’ behavior against variable features in class contexts
success_criteria: Differentiation between genuine constant signals and artifacts
Understanding of constants’ influence on model interpretability
Guidance on handling constants in feature engineering
router_constraints: preserve constant and variable feature distinctions
preserve evidence on data preprocessing and collection

planner_strategies.strategic_objective: Investigate the stability and classification relevance of class-conditioned packet size and port distribution differences to understand their contribution to distinguishing traffic classes.
key_checks: Quantify class-conditioned distribution differences for packet and segment sizes
Assess temporal stability of these distributional patterns
Examine relationships between these features and redundant packet-size features
success_criteria: Evidence of stable, class-distinct distributional patterns
Clarification of these features’ predictive relevance
Understanding of their interaction with redundant features
router_constraints: preserve packet size and port distribution evidence
